"The Prophet of Truth's ships breached the Lunar perimeter. Smashed what was left of the Home Fleet." - Miranda Keyes

"Terrestrial casualties from the subsequent bombardment were...extreme. Truth could've landed anywhere, but he committed all his forces here. East Africa. The ruins of New Mombasa. Then, they started digging." - Miranda Keyes
"What about Halo?" - Master Chief

"We stopped it, but only temporarily. Now, the Prophet of Truth is looking for something called 'The Ark', where he'll be able to fire all the Halo Rings. If he succeeds, Humanity, the Covenant, every sentient being in the Galaxy..." - Miranda Keyes

"I'll initiate a low-level strike. Hit 'em right where it hurts. I only have a handful of ships, Master Chief. It's a big risk. But I'm confident—" - Terrance Hood

"You are, all of you, vermin. Cowering in the dirt, thinking what, I wonder? That you might escape the coming fire? No. Your world will burn until its surface is but glass! And not even your Demon will live to creep, blackened from its hole to mar the reflection of our passage... the culmination of our Journey. For your destruction is the will of the gods! And I? I am their instrument!" - Prophet of Truth
"Cocky bastard. Just loves to run his mouth!" - Avery Johnson
"Does he usually mention me?" - John-117

"The gods will not begrudge our excavation. By uncovering this relic, we pay homage to their glory. When the dust settles, we will all see what I already know: here lies the Path, the start of our Great Journey." - Prophet of Truth

"My Dreadnought, the vessel that has so long been the focus of our worship, now rests on its true pedestal. "I will not be shamed. Not again! Not by you!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Chief! Hood's ships are closing fast! Destroy that gun; we're out of time." - Miranda Keyes
"Chief, that gun's been firing non-stop: it's gotta be running hot!" - Avery Johnson
"It's gonna be opening up its access panel!" - Avery Johnson
"Wait till it opens up, vents its excess plasma. Shove some lead down its throat!" - Avery Johnson
"All ships: fire at will!" - Terrance Hood
"This...is the way the world ends." - Cortana
"(coughs) What did Truth just do?! (coughs) Did he activate the rings?!" - Terrance Hood
"No, sir. But he certainly did something..." - Miranda Keyes
"Evac wounded and regroup. Wherever Truth went-" - Terrance Hood
"Sir, new contact - slipping in!" - Naval Officer
"What is it? More Brutes?" - Thel 'Vadam
"Worse." - John-117
"The Flood - it's spreading, all over the city." - Miranda Keyes
"How do we contain it?" - Terrance Hood
"Find the crashed Flood ship; overload its engine core. We either destroy this city, or risk losing the entire planet." - Miranda Keyes
"Do it." - Terrance Hood
"Chief, make your way to the crash site." - Miranda Keyes
"All squads, report!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"Multiple contacts, unknown hostiles." - Marine
"There are some powerful weapons we've not yet used..." - Thel 'Vadam
"There! Over there! We're surrounded, Sergeant!" - Marine
"Aaaaah!" - Marine
"Fall back, fall back!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"Sergeant, come on!" - Female Marine
"Ahhh!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"No! No! No!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"What are you doing?! That's the sergeant!" - Female Marine
"That was the sergeant! It ain't no more..." - Marine
"Quickly! Let us find their ship. Make short work of this abomination!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Uhh! Get off me!" - Marine
"Get it off! Get it off!" - Marine
"It gets inside you, chews you up." - Female Marine
"We gotta get outta here." - Marine
"Wretched/Accursed parasite! Rise up and I will kill you! Again and again!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Chief! (connection drops) I can't tell you everything...it's not safe. The Gravemind...it knows I'm in the sys-(connection drops)." - Cortana

"I...I didn't have a choice...! The L.T...the Sergeant...they were all infected! I could see it crawling...sliding around beneath their skin! (sobs) A-and then they got up...they s-started to talk! Oh, God! Their voices! Oh, God! No, make them stop! I did them a favor...y-yeah that's it; I helped them! (sobs) Maybe...maybe I need to help myself... (breaks out into sobs)" - Traumatized Marine
"Hail, humans, and take heed." - Rtas 'Vadum
"This is the carrier Shadow of Intent." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Clear this sector, while we deal with the Flood." - Rtas 'Vadum
"My brothers, I fear you bring bad news." - Thel 'Vadam
"High Charity has fallen, become a fetid hive!" - Sangheili Major
"And the fleet? Has quarantine been broken?" - Thel 'Vadam
"A single ship broke through our line, and we gave chase." - Sangheili Major
"But we had a fleet of hundreds!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Alas brother, the Flood... It has evolved!" - Sangheili Major
"Chief, the Elites are looking for something. We didn't believe them when they told us." - Miranda Keyes
"It's Cortana, Chief! She's on that ship! Find her - get her out!" - Avery Johnson
"Hurry, Demon! We seek the same prize. But our Shipmaster will sacrifice all to stop the Flood." - Sangheili Major or Special Operations Sangheili
"What great horror is this?!" - Special Operations Sangheili
"What is this?! Some abomination from the ancient texts?!" - Special Operations Sangheili
"I shall remain here. We will let nothing pass." - Thel 'Vadam
"Do not be afraid. I am peace... I am salvation." - Gravemind
"I am a timeless chorus. Join your voice with mine, and sing victory... everlasting!" - Gravemind
"Chief!" - Cortana
"Cortana?" - John-117
"High Charity, the Prophets' holy city, is on its way-" - Cortana
"Cortana!" - John-117
"Reclaimer!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"I must act quickly before your construct suffers any further trauma!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Wait. Leave her alone." - John-117
"If we do not take this device to a safe location, somewhere I can make repairs..." - 343 Guilty Spark
"(accusingly) On Halo, you tried to kill Cortana. You tried to kill me." - John-117

"(defensively) Protocol dictated my response! She had the Activation Index and you were going to destroy my installation. You did destroy my installation. Now, I only have one function: to help you, Reclaimer. As I always should have done." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Will it live, Oracle? Can it be saved?" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Uncertain. This storage device has suffered considerable trauma. Its matrices are... highly unstable." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Perhaps one of our technicians-" - Terrance Hood
"(sternly) That will not be necessary." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Chief!" - Cortana
"Success!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"High Charity, the Prophets' holy city, is on its way to Earth. With an army of Flood. I can't tell you everything. It's not safe. The Gravemind... it knows I'm in the system." - Cortana
"(disappointed) It's just a message." - John-117
"Let it play." - Rtas 'Vadum
"But it doesn't know about the Portal, where it leads. On the other side, there's a solution. A way to stop the Flood, without firing the remaining Halo rings-" - Cortana
"(softly, her voice filled with agony) Hurry, Chief... the Ark... there isn't much time." - Cortana
"I'm... sorry." - 343 Guilty Spark
"No matter, Oracle. We've heard enough. Our fight is through the Portal, with the Brutes and the bastard Truth!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"(wearily) Fine. We'll remain here. Hold out as long as we can." - Terrance Hood
"Did you not hear? Your world is doomed. A Flood army, a Gravemind, has you in its sights! You barely survived a small contamination!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"(angrily) And you, Shipmaster, just glassed half a continent! Maybe the Flood isn't all I should be worried about..." - Terrance Hood
"(just as angrily) One single Flood spore can destroy a species. Were it not for the Arbiter's counsel, I would have glassed your entire planet!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Sir, with respect, Cortana has a solution." - Miranda Keyes
"Cortana? Did you see her condition? How damaged she is?" - Terrance Hood
"She could be corrupted for all we know. Her 'solution' could be a Flood trap!" - Terrance Hood
"We should go through the Portal, find out for sure." - Miranda Keyes

"What we should do Commander, is understand - clearly - that this is humanity's final stand - here - at Earth. We go, we risk everything; every last man, woman and child. If we stand our ground, we might just have a chance." - Terrance Hood
"(flatly) No. If your construct is wrong, then the Flood has already won." - Thel 'Vadam
"I'll find Cortana's solution. And I'll bring it back." - John-117
"Earth... is all we have left. You trust Cortana that much?" - Terrance Hood
"Sir. Yes, sir." - John-117
"This is either the best decision you've ever made or the worst. Hell of it is, Chief? I doubt I'll live long enough to find out which." - Terrance Hood
"Brute ships. Staggered line! Shipmaster, they outnumber us, three-to-one!" - Sangheili Major
"Then it is an even fight. (COM) All cruisers, fire at will! Burn their mongrel hides!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Truth's ship isn't taking part in the attack. He must've gone to ground!" - Miranda Keyes
"Roger that, Ma'am! We're on him! (to Hocus) Kick the door." - Avery Johnson
"We good, Hocus?" - Avery Johnson
"She's a little cooked, Sergeant Major... But she'll hold." - Hocus
"Alright. Pop the hatch!" - Avery Johnson
"That's some view." - ODST #1

"Enjoy it while you can, Marines. Soon as we land, we're right back to it. Priority one: secure a landing zone for the Commander's Frigate. Keep your eyes and ears open. We need all the intel we can get... on wherever the hell we are." - Avery Johnson
"Stand to, Marines!" - Avery Johnson
"Oo-rah!" - Marines
"Go, go, go!!" - Avery Johnson
"Hey, check it out. In the sky. Is that-?" - ODST #2
"Hey, focus! We got a job to do." - ODST #1
"Chief, eyes on." - ODST leader
"Got a good angle." - ODST leader
"You take the first shot." - ODST leader
"My Dreadnought cannot rise. Even now it is engaged, turns deftly in the wards of this new world. Do not relent until the heretic ships are smashed!" - Prophet of Truth
"We got more enemy contacts ahead, move out!" - ODST #1
"They're setting up an AA battery. That thing'll tear the Dawn apart... We'll wait for you to take the shot." - ODST leader
"Chief, I'm giving the Brutes all I've got...but this is a heavy-weight fight! The Dawn's only got the tonnage to last a few rounds. Find me a place to set her down. Over!" - Miranda Keyes
"The area is secure, let's move ahead." - ODST #1
"Chief, Commander Keyes is counting on us to clear the LZ." - ODST #2
"Come on Chief, move ahead. Go, go, go!" - Avery Johnson
"Thrusters are gone, I can't control it!" - Longsword Pilot
"(whispering) Flak got our Pelican too, sir. But before we went down, we spotted a good LZ. If we can get to our vehicles, we'll lead you to it." - Chips Dubbo
"Hit them again! And again! And again!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Got a lock! Fox, Fox!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"Negative, protect the Pelicans!" - Miranda Keyes
"Now, close for the finish!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Negative, get out of there!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"Let your cannons roar." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Broadside! What fools to face our guns!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Fire pods one through twelve. Archers away." - Miranda Keyes
"New contacts at point two-three-eight!" - Miranda Keyes
"Affirmative. I see it...." - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"No! I will handle those myself." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Seraphs, on my six!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"Stay away from those cruisers!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Understood. Engage those Seraphs!" - Miranda Keyes
"Splash one, coming about." - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"Let the Elites handle those cruisers." - Miranda Keyes
"Full shields! Ramming speed!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Point laser fire, break off!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"I'm hit, I'm hit!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"Watch your fire, watch your fire!" - Miranda Keyes
"I've lost avionics - going to try and hit their carrier! Goodbye, guys." - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"All squadrons, form up! Form up!" - Unknown Longsword Pilot
"A mark of honor for that kill." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Suppress with main point laser batteries." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Forward lances, draw their fire." - Rtas 'Vadum
"...burn." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Affirmative, that's a hit." - Miranda Keyes
"They have been gutted stem to stern." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Look at it blister and burn." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Charge the MAC. Give me a firing solution." - Miranda Keyes
"Stand by to jettison the [unintelligible: "HEVs"?] on my mark." - Miranda Keyes
"Mount up. Let's find that LZ. Follow us, sir, all the way down this canyon." - Chips Dubbo
"Nooooo! Hit the carrier! Kill the Half Jaw and his crew!" - Jiralhanae Commander
"Keep these fools at bay. Drive the heretic ships back through the Portal!" - Jiralhanae Commander
"Their cruisers mixed with ours! Watch your fire!" - Jiralhanae Commander
"Do not fear the Prophets' wrath, because if you fail I will have your hide!" - Jiralhanae Commander
"Careful, sir! Brutes must've tripped a defense system." - ODST #2
"Ma'am, Hocus almost got her wing shot off. But we spotted a structure on the other side of this wall. It matches Cortana's description of the map room on the first Halo ring." - Avery Johnson
"A Cartographer. Good. Should help us fix Truth's location. Secure the LZ, then we'll push through that wall." - Miranda Keyes
"Roger that. Follow my Pelican, Chief! The LZ's this way." - Avery Johnson
"Tidy little bastards. Hope they never decide to clean us up." - ODST #1
"It's like they don't even see us." - Marine #1
"Oh, they see us all right. They just haven't decided what to do with us yet." - ODST #1
"The LZ's through this cave, sir. Watch yourself; got Covenant heavy armor!" - ODST #1
"Hold the line! Enemy charging!" - Marine
"That did it. LZ's clear." - Avery Johnson
"Oo-rah! The LZ's clear!" - Marine #1
"OK. Tell us what you need." - ODST #1
"Commander? Bring her down." - Avery Johnson
"Roger that. Beginning my descent." - Miranda Keyes
"Look! Up high! Here she comes!" - ODST #2 or Dubbo
"Is the Dawn rated for atmosphere?" - ODST #1
"Guess we're gonna find out...hey! Take cover!" - ODST #2 or Dubbo
"Thanks, Chief. I wouldn't have lasted much longer up there. Come to the back of the frigate." - Miranda Keyes
"C'mon, Chief! Let's see what the Commander has in her arsenal..." - Avery Johnson
"Did the Elites get a fix on the Cartographer?" - Miranda Keyes
"Yes, ma'am; just on the other side of that wall. But it's surrounded by Brute heavy armor." - Avery Johnson
"Johnson, have the Elites found anything?" - Miranda Keyes
"A structure on the other side of that wall, ma'am. But it's surrounded by Brute heavy armor." - Avery Johnson

"Don't worry; I've got a plan. If we can't fly over the wall, we'll go right through it. Chief, take one of the tanks, lead the way. If you find any locked doors, Spark will be happy to pry them open." - Miranda Keyes
"I will certainly try my best, though I am unfamiliar with this facility." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Alright then, you heard the lady." - Avery Johnson
"Shall I help you choose a vehicle, Reclaimer? This one seems in very good condition, primitive armor not withstanding." - 343 Guilty Spark
"A tank's a tank, light-bulb. Pick one, Chief. Get back to the wall. I'll help the Commander secure the Dawn. Then we'll meet you at the Cartographer." - Avery Johnson
"Mount up - let's roll!" - Avery Johnson
"Oo-rah!" - Marines
"Hey, how does 90 millimeters of tungsten strike you?" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Tank beats Ghost!" - Marine #2
"Tank beats Hunter!" - Marine #2
"Tank beats everything! Oh, man! I could do this all day!" - Marine #2
"All armor, form up on the lower doorway. Chief, get upstairs; have your robot pick that lock!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"I beg your pardon? I am 343 Guilty Spark, Monitor of Installation 04." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Yeah, well...you're also our ticket through this wall. So if you don't mind?" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"I will gladly aid the Reclaimer's progress." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Reclaimer, come to the upper doorway, the others can take the lower one." - 343 Guilty Spark
"We'll go along, Chief, you check the upper floor. Make sure we have a path through the wall!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Armor's gotta go along, Chief, you take the upper floor, make sure they have a path through the wall!" - Avery Johnson

"Please, use caution; avoid collateral damage! While this facility looks quite hardy on the surface, there are undoubtedly delicate structures below the façade. (pause) Odd, for a doorway to require such robust security protocols. One moment, Reclaimer." - 343 Guilty Spark
"There we are. Please, follow me." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Chief! Get back up there and make sure we have a clear path through the wall." - Avery Johnson
"Here, this panel will activate a bridge." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Allow your companions to cross below." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Place your hand on the pad, Reclaimer." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Excellent. This way!" - 343 Guilty Spark

"(hums) Sudden clarity! These Sentinels were trying to deny access to the lower levels of this facility. A wise decision, given the Meddlers' preference for...destructive acquisition." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Good work, Chief. Link up with our armor on the far side of the wall. Make your way down to the Cartographer." - Miranda Keyes
"Hurry! To the Cartographer!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Heads up, Marines! We got trouble." - Avery Johnson
"Sir, Hog's all yours! Let's hit that hostile armor!" - Marine #3 or Dubbo
"All armor, form up! Hit 'em where it hurts!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Target those Wraiths!" - Female Marine
"First line, clear! Move up!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Second line, clear! Push forward!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Scarab's back! This time it means business!" - Marine #4
"Bravo, flank and cover! I want everybody supporting the Chief; he'll take it down!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Take out the legs, Chief!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Take out its legs! Climb on board!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"The back plating looks vulnerable, light that sucker up!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Back plating looks vulnerable; light it up!" - Avery Johnson
"Hit it in the knees, Chief!" - Stacker or Johnson
"Find that power core, Chief." - Avery Johnson

"I opened the Portal to this hallowed place, this shelter from Halo's fire, in the hopes that more of our Covenant would follow. Alas, save for a rabble of Heretics and their Demon allies, we are all that made the passage. Thus we must temper joy with sorrow. Keep in our hearts those left behind." - Prophet of Truth
"Not bad, Spartan. I saw that explosion from orbit. Truth's fleet lies in ruin. Find where the liar hides...so I may place my boot between his gums!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"We'll know soon enough, Shipmaster." - Miranda Keyes
"Infantry on the spire! Mop 'em up!" - Avery Johnson
"Meet the Arbiter at the top of the spire, Chief." - Avery Johnson
"Chief, Spark's found an entrance inside. Follow him inside." - Avery Johnson
"Well done, Spartan." - Thel 'Vadam
"Hey, what gives?" - Marine #5
"It seems I've crossed a circuit." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Well, let me have a look." - Marine #5
"Oracle!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Little bastard stung me!" - Marine #5
"I did not want you to come to any harm." - 343 Guilty Spark
"(muttering) You've got a funny way of showing it." - Marine #5
"Excellent! This way." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Slothful runts. Kill them as they sleep." - Thel 'Vadam
"(whisper) Chief, tap 'em out." - Marine #5
"Come, Reclaimer. All you seek is close at hand." - 343 Guilty Spark

"Keep going, Chief! We'll meet you further down the spire. Commander rounded up some air support. They'll stop any hostile reinforcements, but the Brutes already inside? They're all yours." - Avery Johnson
"Sincere apology. But how --" - 343 Guilty Spark
"The archive is intact?! Then our makers' plan --" - 343 Guilty Spark
"A what?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"A Foundry?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"(happily) Your goal is just below!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Reclaimer, continue downward." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Cartographer! Come, it awaits your approval." - 343 Guilty Spark
"You must activate the Cartographer, Reclaimer." - 343 Guilty Spark
"(surprised) That's...our galaxy. We're beyond the rim." - John-117
"Two to the eighteenth light years from galactic center, to be precise." - 343 Guilty Spark
"What is this place?" - John-117
"The Ark." - 343 Guilty Spark
"This is the Ark?" - John-117
"I always assumed it was part of a... shield installation, but it seems I was mistaken." - 343 Guilty Spark
"(sarcastically) That's a first." - John-117

"(smugly) Not at all. While I had a complete understanding of Installation 04, my makers wisely limited my knowledge of all other strategic facilities. Compartmentalization - in case I was ever captured by the Flood." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Can you tell me where we are exactly?" - John-117
"Here." - 343 Guilty Spark
"And Truth?" - John-117
"Near one of the Ark's superluminal communication arrays, I'm afraid. Unfortunate. The Meddler has triggered a barrier; a defensive perimeter around the Ark's core." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The barrier will be difficult to disable... how odd that my makers would place such a comprehensive defense around a single - (shocked) Oh my." - 343 Guilty Spark
"What is it?" - John-117
"Phantom!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Spark! Move!" - John-117
"We must get past that barrier! Or the Meddler will destroy it all!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Chief, you got a whole mess of hostile air inbound! Get back inside while we take 'em out." - Avery Johnson
"Follow the Oracle, Spartan." - Thel 'Vadam
"I will help your Sergeant clear the sky." - Thel 'Vadam
"Sir, Pelicans are gonna land... one level down!" - Chips Dubbo
"Protocol dictates action. The installation was my responsibility, if my suspicions are correct... no! I must not jump to any conclusions." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The pack will feast on you!" - Cethegus
"Hang tight, Chief! We're on our way!" - Avery Johnson
"Fight me, I'm right here!" - Cethegus
"You must win this fight on your own. Failure will bring a fate worse than death - abandonment, as we step forward without you." - Prophet of Truth
"ETA: damn quick! Standby for pickup!" - Avery Johnson
"Commander!" - John-117
"Johnson! Look sharp!" - Miranda Keyes
"I got it!" - Avery Johnson
"No, don't shoot! They mean us no harm! Those units have a priority task." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh, yeah? And what might that be?" - Avery Johnson
"I really can't say... not for sure. But if you allow me to find a terminal closer to the Core-" - 343 Guilty Spark
"No, Oracle. We must keep the Prophet of Truth firmly in our sights." - Thel 'Vadam
"But what about your construct? Her solution to the Flood? With more data, I might-" - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Arbiter's right. We have priorities too. Until we kill Truth, stop the rings from firing... nothing else matters." - Miranda Keyes
"We hit these three generators, and the barrier will fall?" - Commander Miranda Keyes
"A small section, yes." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Good enough. Johnson, drop the Chief at the first generator, then head to the third. The Elites will punch right down the middle." - Miranda Keyes
"Roger that." - Avery Johnson
"Charlie Foxtrot! Tower One approach has active Triple-A!" - Hocus
"Mayday! I can't control her!" - Damaged Pelican Pilot
"Pelican down! Pelican down!" - Hocus
"Brace yourselves; we're going in a little hot!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Pile out! Go, go, go! Up the beach! Kill that Wraith!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"Pile out! Go, go, go! Alright, up the beach! Take out that Wraith!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"Commander, this is Kilo 23. Lost my wingman and our only 'Hog. Over." - Hocus
"Roger that, Hocus. Get out of there!" - Miranda Keyes
"Beachhead secure, Commander. Hostile Anti-Air has been neutralized." - ODST
"Hold position, I'm on my way. Shipmaster, begin diversionary bombardment." - Miranda Keyes
"I will beat the Prophet's shield like a drum. By the time the barrier falls, he will beg for mercy." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Spark believes Truth can activate the rings at anytime. If he does, Earth, every being in the galaxy... Halo will kill them all." - Miranda Keyes
"Get to the First Tower. Shut it down." - Miranda Keyes
"Ma'am, we're on the ground. Third Tower in sight." - Avery Johnson
"Good. The Arbiter and the Elites have touched down at number 2." - Miranda Keyes
"Good. The Elites have touched down at number 2." - Miranda Keyes
"Objective in sight! Watch for heavy armor!" - ODST/Marine
"Chief. You've got to offline that tower." - Miranda Keyes
"Get inside that tower. Take it down!" - Miranda Keyes
"Perimeter secure. Get inside that tower!" - ODST/Marine
"Stick together! Check your corners!" - ODST/Marine
"Sir, go on. Tower controls should be up top!" - ODST/Marine
"We'll secure the area, sir." - ODST/Marine
"We'll hold things down here." - ODST/Marine
"Chief, find the tower controls, and shut it down!" - Miranda Keyes
"Good work, Chief! That's one. The Arbiter should be just about to..." - Miranda Keyes
"Good work, Chief! That's one. The Elites should be just about to..." - Miranda Keyes
"...that's two! It's all up to Johnson's team now." - Miranda Keyes
"Get back outside, Chief. Wait for transport." - Miranda Keyes
"Johnson, come in. Over." - Miranda Keyes
"Brute reinforcements, ma'am (static)! We're pinned down!" - Avery Johnson
"I'm on my way!" - Miranda Keyes
"Negative! Fire's too heavy! (to his squad) Everyone fall back! Now! (static and cut-off)" - Avery Johnson
"Sergeant Major!" - Miranda Keyes
"Johnson! Can you hear me?! (No response) Chief, you need to link up with the Arbiter and proceed directly to the Third Tower. Make your way back to the beach." - Miranda Keyes
"Chief, you need to link up with the Elites and proceed directly to the Third Tower. Make your way back to the beach." - Miranda Keyes
"Get in, sir." - Marine Driver
"Sir. Got a flight of birds that need an escort. Take the Hornet; get those Pelicans safely to the Third Tower." - Hocus
"Second Tower is clear, Spartan, no need to land. Let us hasten to the Third." - Thel 'Vadam (Elite in Co-op)
"Objective in sight, Commander... No sign of Johnson or his team." - Pelican Pilot
"Understood. Chief, clear an LZ, then get inside the tower." - Miranda Keyes
"Darken this tower and the barrier will fall. Go, Spartan! We have no time to waste." - Thel 'Vadam
"Hit the switch, Chief, and the barrier will fall!" - Miranda Keyes
"Now, Prophet... your end has come." - Rtas 'Vadum
"High Charity...? By the Gods. Brace for impact!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Shipmaster, what's your status?" - Miranda Keyes
"Significant damage! Weapon system disabled!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"Move to a safe distance, stay away from the Flood." - Miranda Keyes
"Why would the Parasite come here?!" - Rtas 'Vadum
"The Ark is out of range of all the active installations! Priority: We must contain this outbreak, before-" - 343 Guilty Spark
"No! First, we stop Truth. Then we deal with the Flood." - Miranda Keyes
"Quickly, I must see the point of impact; assess the damage to the Ark." - 343 Guilty Spark
"To the top of these hills, Oracle, no higher. We cannot risk your capture by the Flood." - Thel 'Vadam

"Shipmaster's carrier is out of commission, Chief. I need you to take down Truth. The Flood's just going to put pressure on him; accelerate his plans. Punch through the cliffs! Get inside that Citadel!" - Miranda Keyes
"Citadel in sight! Brutes are mobilizing everything they've got." - Pelican Pilot
"Hornets, inbound!" - Gunnery Sergeant Stacker
"I count two Scarabs! Repeat: two Scarabs!" - Pelican Pilot
"First Scarab's down! All units, concentrate your fire on number two!" - Miranda Keyes
"Both Scarabs down, well done." - Miranda Keyes
"Marines, kill the stragglers!" - Miranda Keyes
"Spartan, come to me. This platform hides a path!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Chief, Spark has found a way into the Citadel. He's waiting for you on the platform, Chief. Go!" - Miranda Keyes
"The Flood scales the Citadel's far wall. Activate this bridge, Oracle! (turning to the Chief) The Prophet will die by my hands, not theirs." - Thel 'Vadam
"Calamity! If only we had more time!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"It asked, and I answered. (turns bitter) For a moment of safety, I loosed damnation upon the stars." - Cortana (Cortana Moment)
"My faithful...stand firm!" - Prophet of Truth
"Though our enemies crowd around us, we tread the blessed path. In a moment, I will light the rings! And all who believe...shall be saved!" - Prophet of Truth
"Chief, how close are you?" - Miranda Keyes
"Not close enough." - John-117
"That the best you got?" - Avery Johnson
"Oh, come on. Impress me." - Avery Johnson
"Stop, you imbecile! He wants you to kill him!" - Prophet of Truth
"I'd prefer that you did not..." - Prophet of Truth
"I admit, I need your help." - Prophet of Truth
"But that secret dies with all the rest." - Prophet of Truth
"Johnson! (ejects a shell from her shotgun) Sound off!" - Miranda Keyes
"(coughing) Get - out of here!" - Avery Johnson
"Not without you!" - Miranda Keyes
"You're right..." - Miranda Keyes
"Do it. Me...then you..." - Avery Johnson
"Now!" - Avery Johnson
"No!" - Avery Johnson
"Your forefathers wisely set aside their compassion..." - Prophet of Truth
"...steeled themselves for what needed to be done." - Prophet of Truth
"I see now why they left you behind." - Prophet of Truth
"You were weak. And gods must be strong." - Prophet of Truth
"Do not shoot, but listen! Let me lead you safely to our foe. Only you can halt what he has set in motion." - Gravemind
"How could I have known the Parasite would follow?! Undoubtedly this is the Heretics' doing! A final, bitter curse. Clear evidence of treachery long hidden!" - Prophet of Truth

"So far are we along the path, that I must strain to hear the clumsy patter of their pursuit. Know this, my brothers: they may foul the way with their charred and broken bones, but they will not stop the Journey." - Prophet of Truth
"It will not last!" - Thel 'Vadam
"Your kind...never believed in the promise of the sacred rings." - Prophet of Truth
"Lies for the weak. Beacons for the deluded." - Gravemind
"I will have my revenge. On a Prophet, not a plague!" - Thel 'Vadam
"My feet tread the Path. I shall become a god!" - Prophet of Truth
"You will be food - nothing more." - Gravemind
"And so… you must be silenced." - Thel 'Vadam
"Now the gate has been unlatched, headstones pushed aside… corpses shift and offer room, a fate you must abide!" - Gravemind
"I can barely keep hold of her, Chief! No way I can pick you up! Head back to the lift... find a way down!" - Avery Johnson
"I'm a thief...but I keep what I steal." - Cortana (Cortana Moment)
"What do you see?" - Thel 'Vadam
"A replacement. For the ring you destroyed." - Thel 'Vadam
"When did you know?" - John-117
"Just now - but...I had my hopes. What will you do?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Light it." - John-117
"Though it will take time to fabricate an Activation Index, I will see to the letter that..." - 343 Guilty Spark
"How will you light it?" - Thel 'Vadam
"Chief, I'll round up our survivors, fall back to the Dawn." - Avery Johnson
"Arbiter will do the same with the Elites." - Avery Johnson
"The Shipmaster will do the same with the Elites." - Avery Johnson
"Cortana's in there somewhere..." - Avery Johnson
"Child of my enemy, why have you come? I offer no forgiveness: a father's sins pass to his son." - Gravemind
"I ran, tried to stay hidden, but there was no escape! He cornered me, wrapped me tight... and brought me close." - Cortana
"Of course, you came for her... We exist together now. Two corpses, in one grave..." - Gravemind
"It was the coin's fault! I wanted to make you strong, keep you safe...(drop in tone) I'm sorry, I can't..." - Cortana
"You know me. When I make a promise…" - John-117
"You… keep it. (she raises her head, and sounds amused) I do know how to pick 'em." - Cortana
"Lucky me. Do you still have it?" - John-117
"The Activation Index from the first Halo ring. A little souvenir I hung onto… just in case. (she looks around) Got an escape plan?" - Cortana
"Thought I'd try shooting my way out - mix things up a little." - John-117
"You hurt it, Chief. But not for long. We need to get to Halo - destroy the Flood once and for all." - Cortana
"An explosion just made us an exit! I'll mark it on your HUD, Chief, go!" - Cortana
"Analyzing the route ahead… I have it mostly figured out. Just keep going. I'll update your HUD as quickly as I can." - Cortana
"Corridors ahead have all collapsed. I'll find another way, Chief; be careful." - Cortana
"Corridors beyond this point have collapsed. I'm looking for an alternate. Careful." - Cortana
"There, Chief, into the maintenance tunnel." - Cortana
"I've got a friendly contact! Who would be crazy enough to come in here?" - Cortana
"We are aboard, Humans...and Elites. Will you not come with us, brother?" - Rtas 'Vadum
"No. This is our fight. And I will see it finished." - Thel 'Vadam
"Johnson? Do you have the Frigate?" - Cortana
"Yes, ma'am. I'll land her as close to the control room as I can." - Avery Johnson
"Safe is better than close, Sergeant Major." - Cortana
"Roger that. And ma'am? It's good to have you back." - Johnson
"Halo. It's so new... Unfinished. I'm not exactly sure what will happen when we fire it..." - Cortana
"We'll head for the Portal. And we'll all go home." - John-117
"Head through the cliffs." - Cortana
"The Control Room isn't far!" - Cortana
"Where are you going?" - Cortana
"Wait, what's that?" - Cortana
"How many of these have you found?" - Cortana
"Come on, Chief, let's get back on track. The Control Room is outside!" - Cortana
"Flood dispersal pods! Control Room's at the top of that tower, Chief, go!" - Cortana
"There should be ramps that lead to the top - check the other side!" - Cortana
"I got you covered, Chief. Meet you at the top of that tower." - Avery Johnson
"Careful, I can't cover you on the far side." - Avery Johnson
"Keep moving, Chief! I've got your back." - Avery Johnson
"Flood are crawling all over that tower; watch yourself!" - Avery Johnson
"Spark? You in there? Open the damn door!" - Avery Johnson
"Of course, Reclaimer. Just as soon as you dispose of all proximate Flood threats. I'm afraid contamination protocols do not allow me to-" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Yeah, yeah, I hear you!" - Avery Johnson
"Was that the Monitor? You didn't tell me he was here. Well, we are finally doing what he wanted." - Cortana
"I have beaten fleets of thousands! Consumed a galaxy of flesh and mind and bone!" - Gravemind
"Open up! Coast is clear." - Avery Johnson
"Not for long. I'm tracking additional dispersal pods. They'll be hitting any minute!" - Cortana
"Chief, Arbiter! Let's move!" - Avery Johnson
"Do I take life or give it? Who is victim, and who is foe?" - Gravemind
"It's trying to rebuild itself on this ring!" - Cortana
"Hurry! Control Room's close!" - Avery Johnson
"Yank me, Chief." - Cortana
"I'm not gonna lose her too." - Avery Johnson
"Yes...isn't it? (Short but uneasy silence) I have begun my simulations. No promises, but initial results indicate this facility should be ready to fire...in just a few more days!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Unacceptable! Unacceptable! Absolutely unacceptable!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"I take no pleasure in doing what must be done." - 343 Guilty Spark
"You do not deserve this ring!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"I have kept it safe. It belongs to me!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Not for long!" - Avery Johnson
"You - you cracked my casing!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Damage! Damage! That hurt, Reclaimer!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"My eye! Do you mean to blind me?!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Stop now, before one of us gets hurt!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Accept your le-gacy!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Think of you-ou-ou-our forefathers!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh myyyyyyyyyy-aaahh!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"I'm getting you out of here." - John-117
"N-No... No, you're not." - Avery Johnson
"Don't - don't let her go. Don't...ever let her go. (coughs) Send me out... with a bang." - Avery Johnson
"I am sorry, Spartan. But come." - Thel 'Vadam
"Even in death, your Sergeant guides us on." - Thel 'Vadam
"The Dawn... Of course - the frigate! We still have a chance!" - Cortana
"Find the doorway in the cliffs, Chief. The Dawn is on the other side." - Cortana
"See that doorway further on? Get to it." - Cortana
"Don't let this ring be the end of us, Chief." - Cortana
"There! Johnson's Warthog." - Cortana
"Come on, Spartan - go, go, go!" - Cortana
"Drive, Chief. Head for the frigate." - Cortana
"Come on! Faster!" - Cortana
"The Dawn is close. We can make it! As long as the ground doesn't fall underneath us..." - Cortana
"The charging sequence...it's too much for the ring to take!" - Cortana
"Halo is ripping itself apart!" - Cortana
"Hurry, Chief! Don't stop!" - Cortana
"Charging sequence at 30%..." - Cortana
"50%, Chief!" - Cortana
"70%!" - Cortana
"80% charged!" - Cortana

"Hey, Demon! The jerk store called, and they're all out of you! Poor you, stolen at the age of six and conscripted into the military, waaaaagh...! Okay look, if you let me live, I got the Fist of Rukt. Look, I'll be the bottom! I'll polish your boots. I'll polish your helmet! It's the gas, ha-ha! When I'm on the gas, I don't know what I'm doing half the time!" - Final Grunt
"Gun it, Chief! Jump! Floor it! Right into the hangar!" - Cortana
"Hang on!" - Cortana
"Chief!" - Cortana
"If we don't make it..." - Cortana
"It's been an honor serving with you, John." - Cortana

"For us, the storm has passed. The war is over. But let us never forget those who journeyed into the howling dark and did not return. For their decision required courage beyond measure..." - Terrance Hood
"...sacrifice, and unshakable conviction that their fight, our fight, was elsewhere." - Terrance Hood
"As we start to rebuild, this hillside will remain barren. A memorial to heroes fallen. They ennobled all of us, and they shall not be forgotten." - Terrance Hood
"Present arms!" - Gunnery Sergeant Reynolds
"I remember how this war started. What your kind did to mine. I can't forgive you. But..." - Terrance Hood
"You have my thanks. For standing by him to the end." - Terrance Hood
"Hard to believe he's dead." - Terrance Hood
"Things look different. Without the Prophets' lies clouding my vision. I would like to see our own world - to know that it is safe." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Fear not. For we have made it so." - Thel 'Vadam
"By your word, Arbiter." - Rtas 'Vadum
"Take us home." - Thel 'Vadam
"Chief? Can you hear me?" - Cortana
"What happened?" - John-117
"I'm not sure. When Halo fired, it shook itself to pieces. Did a number on the Ark. The Portal couldn't sustain itself. We made it through just as it collapsed." - Cortana
"Well... some of us made it." - Cortana
"But you did it. Truth and the Covenant, the Flood..." - Cortana
"It's finished." - Cortana
"It's finished." - John-117
"I'll drop a beacon, but it'll be a while before anyone finds us." - Cortana
"Years, even." - Cortana
"I'll miss you." - Cortana
"Wake me. When you need me." - John-117
